title: Election 2026 LIVE: Trinamool claims BJP issued ‘death threats’ to Mamata Banerjee ahead of final phase in Bengal
description: Election 2026 LIVE: The Trinamool Congress shared a post by BJP national spokesperson Ajay Alok on Tuesday, alleging he issued “death threats” to Bengal chief minister Mamata Banerjee. The party also took a dig at the Election Commission, saying it sits in “studied silence”.
